narrative:
North Olmsted-02-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,146 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.9 percentage points.
